word: H8423 - תּוּבַל קַיִן - Tûwbal Qayin - too-bal' kah'-yin - Tubal-cain

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּוּבל קין

Transliteration: tûbal qayin

Phonetic: too-bal' kah'-yin

BDB Definition:

Tubal-cain = "thou will be brought of Cain"
  1. son of Lamech by his wife Zillah and the first worker in metal

Origin: apparently from H2986 (compare H2981) and H7014

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
